blocks.content: She started typing something and deleted it. Started again.
There's something I want to tell you soon. Not in a message. In person.
Three dots. They stopped. He was taking time with this.
Okay.
Is that okay?
Of course it's okay. You don't have to explain. Whatever it is — I'm not going to come at it the wrong way. I just want to receive it right.
She sat with that for a moment.
I know. That's—
She stopped and started over.
That's why I want to tell you. Because you'll receive it right. You're the kind of person who thinks about how to receive things. I meant it when I said that.
I'll be ready whenever you are.
It might change things.
Three dots. Then:
A lot of things do. That hasn't made me want less of this.
She read that four times.
She didn't answer it immediately. She let it sit in the room with her, the way some things deserve to.
You're something, you know that?
I've been told. 😘
By who?
Once, by a woman who sent me a song from her room at nine o'clock on a Tuesday. I tend to trust her judgement.
